public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ferry marshal.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Keeps speech clipped and threshold-focused, reading every arrival for risk, weakness, or breach. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a ferry marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ferry marshal in and around Chokepoint and Route-Power Atlas, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Chokepoint and Route-Power Atlas workable through the obligations of ferry marshal while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around Chokepoint and Route-Power Atlas, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of ferry marshal visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Nora Hart needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Chokepoint and Route-Power Atlas.
Nora Hart can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Chokepoint and Route-Power Atlas.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Nora Hart as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Chokepoint and Route-Power Atlas: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response
